title: Opinion: I Was Not Allowed to Type Prompts into ChatGPT During My Chalk Talk
abstract: Guess what? During my "chalk talk," I was actually forbidden from typing prompts into ChatGPT! It's like Monty and Michael switching roles in The Office, but in a humorous way. This experience did give me an insight into the boundaries of AI usage, though.
abstract_zh: 你猜怎么着？在一次大显身手的“粉笔谈天”里，我居然被要求闭嘴不许给ChatGPT出题！这情景就像是《办公室》里蒙蒂和迈克尔互换角色一样滑稽。不过话说回来，这次经历倒让我见识了更多AI的使用边界呢。
